Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to output a DuckDB SQL query that accomplishes steps

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Provide a query that creates CTEs ordered activities per case using LISTAGG with ordering then count per variant then rank then filter top K then join back to original table on case_id where variant in top K

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: DuckDB supports LISTAGG with ORDER BY inside

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Eg SELECT case_id LISTAGG activity comma ORDER BY timestamp AS variant FROM event_log GROUP BY case_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then count per variant SELECT variant COUNT star AS cnt FROM grouped cases GROUP BY variant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then top K Use ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT K use subquery

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then final select all columns from event_log joined with selected case ids where variant in top variants

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Let K be a parameter we can use a placeholder like K

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Make sure we use correct LISTAGG syntax DuckDB supports LISTAGG with ORDER BY inside
